textByHashes.08c49454fe72933a2a1fb392c8a68cc94b05f509: Good afternoon. In need of a haircut are we? Currently we're offering this service for free!
textByHashes.a43cfc0162bbe931cbca5983816b3019936b37d9: Please select the hairstyle you would like from this brochure. I'll even throw in a free recolour.
textByHashes.1d7f0cc95a574df4fc8d16cc1d308639e653c3dd: Please select the facial hair you would like from this brochure. I'll even throw in a free recolour.
textByHashes.fe58ac774dba3913aed32691fd731327e2a79c7d: Very well. Come back if you change your mind.
